InvestorProfile.title: InvestorProfile
InvestorProfile.description: Represents an individual investor's profile within the application, providing basic contact and account details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvestorProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the investor.

lastName.description: The last name of the investor.

email.description: The email address of the investor, used for identification and communication.

role.description: The authorization level of the user (e.g., 'investor', 'admin').

autoProfitEnabled.description: Whether automated daily profit calculation is active for this investor.

dailyProfitAmount.description: The fixed amount of profit to add to the portfolio every 24 hours.

profitAssetType.description: The asset class (e.g., 'Crypto', 'Stock') where the profit will be applied.

lastYieldAccrualAt.description: Timestamp of the last yield accrual process.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the investor profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the investor profile was last updated.

Investment.title: Investment
Investment.description: Represents a single financial holding within an investor's portfolio, detailing its acquisition, type, and current market value.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Investment entity.

investorId.description: Reference to the InvestorProfile who owns this investment.

name.description: A descriptive name for the investment.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol or identifier for the investment.

type.description: The category or type of the investment (e.g., 'Stock', 'Bond', 'ETF', 'Crypto').

purchaseDate.description: The date and time when the investment was purchased.

purchasePricePerUnit.description: The price per unit at the time of purchase.

quantity.description: The total number of units purchased.

currentMarketPricePerUnit.description: The latest known market price per unit.

lastPriceUpdate.description: Timestamp of the last price update.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the investment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the investment record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual investments owned by a specific investor.
